details.description: Daytime view across the Vieux-Port of La Rochelle under a bright blue sky with scattered cumulus clouds. In the middle distance stands a short cylindrical lighthouse painted in horizontal red-and-white bands with a red lantern (on a quay lined with information panels and trees). Behind it are the colorful wooden buildings of the Gabut district, and a large white Ferris wheel rises above the rooftops. In the foreground, calm harbor water reflects light; a small white-and-yellow passenger shuttle boat with a French flag is at lower left and a green navigation buoy floats near the quay. At the extreme right edge, part of a massive medieval stone tower with corbelled machicolations is visible, one of the famous harbor towers guarding the old port.

details.description: Harbor scene at La Rochelle's Vieux Port. In the foreground, calm water with a small passenger boat moored along the quay. A red-and-white striped lighthouse (Phare du Gabut) rises near the water's edge, with a row of colorful, timber-framed buildings (green and yellow facades) behind it along the quay. A large white Ferris wheel sits behind the buildings, creating a playful contrast between historic port architecture and modern tourist amenities. On the right edge, a portion of a tall stone wall or tower suggests medieval fortifications near the port. The sky is bright blue with scattered fluffy clouds, and daylight lighting gives strong shadows and vibrant colors, typical of a sunny coastal day in La Rochelle.

details.description: Harbor scene at La Rochelle’s Vieux-Port: calm greenish water in the foreground with a small yellow-and-white passenger ferry at left and a green navigation buoy mid-channel. On the right edge, the stone face of a medieval harbor tower is visible in close foreground. Across the basin stands a short cylindrical lighthouse painted in red-and-white bands, and behind it rises a large white Ferris wheel above low, colorful buildings and trees. The sky is bright with scattered cumulus clouds and several seabirds.

details.description: A bright waterfront scene at La Rochelle's Vieux-Port. In the foreground, calm water occupies the lower edge with a small white-and-yellow boat partially visible at the left. A red-and-white striped lighthouse stands on the quay near the center-left, dominating the mid-ground. Behind it, a row of colorful, wooden harbor houses lines the waterfront, and a large white Ferris wheel rises against a blue sky filled with scattered fluffy clouds. To the right, rugged harbor walls and stone structures frame the scene. The photographer appears to be near Rue de la Chaîne, looking toward the port and ferris wheel.

details.description: A bright, sunny view of the entrance to the Vieux Port (Old Port) of La Rochelle. In the foreground, the dark blue water of the harbor is visible, with the bow of a white and yellow passenger boat (flying a French flag) entering from the left. On the immediate right edge, a tall, weathered stone wall belonging to a medieval tower frames the scene. Across the water, the midground features the distinctive red and white striped Phare du Gabut (lighthouse). Behind the lighthouse, the colorful wooden buildings of the Le Gabut district are painted in vibrant shades of yellow, blue, and red. In the background, a large white Ferris wheel (Grande Roue) stands tall against a deep blue sky scattered with fluffy white cumulus clouds.

details.description: A vibrant daytime view of the Vieux Port in La Rochelle, France. The scene features the iconic Phare Rouge, a red and white striped lighthouse, standing near the colorful wooden buildings of the Quartier Le Gabut, which exhibit a Scandinavian architectural style with bright yellow, green, and red facades. A large white Ferris wheel (Grande Roue) dominates the skyline behind the buildings under a bright blue sky with fluffy white clouds. On the far right, the massive stone masonry of a medieval tower, likely the Tour de la Chaîne, frames the image. In the foreground, a portion of a yellow and white electro-solar water taxi, known as a 'Passeur', is visible on the water.

details.description: Waterfront scene in La Rochelle’s Vieux-Port, France. The central subject is a short cylindrical lighthouse painted white with two broad red horizontal bands and a red lantern gallery, set on a quay lined with trees. Behind it rises a large white Ferris wheel. Colorful low-rise wooden-clad buildings sit on the quay, likely part of the Gabut area. A green navigation buoy floats in the harbor water in the foreground-right, and a small yellow‑white passenger boat edge is visible. Sky is blue with scattered clouds; lighting suggests daytime. Masonry from a historic stone structure appears at the image edge.

details.description: A harborfront scene featuring a tall red-and-white striped lighthouse set on a quay, with a large white Ferris wheel visible behind a row of colorful waterfront buildings. The buildings are small, yellow and green, with timber-framed façades and gabled roofs, giving a quaint, coastal-town vibe. A small passenger boat is moored at the edge of the quay on the right, and a stone seawall or harbor wall runs along the left side of the frame. The sky is blue with scattered, fluffy clouds, and the water is a clear turquoise, with gentle ripples from the breeze.

details.description: Harbor scene likely in the Old Port of La Rochelle, France. A short cylindrical lighthouse with bold red-and-white horizontal bands stands on the quay, with a large white Ferris wheel rising behind low waterfront buildings. Part of a massive medieval stone structure/arch frames the left edge. Calm greenish harbor water fills the right, with a green channel marker buoy and a small yellow‑and‑white passenger boat/ferry in the foreground. Sky is bright with scattered cumulus clouds; trees and timber‑fronted houses line the promenade.

details.description: A sunny harbor scene featuring a tall red-and-white striped lighthouse at the edge of a stone quay. Behind and to the right, a large white Ferris wheel rises above pastel-colored, two- to three-story waterfront houses. In the foreground, a wooden quay or pier extends along the water with a small boat visible on the turquoise harbor. A green buoy marks the water, and the sky is blue with fluffy white clouds and a few birds. The overall composition combines maritime architecture, a coastal amusement attraction, and calm harbor waters.

details.description: A scenic view of the Old Port (Vieux Port) in La Rochelle, France, captured on a sunny day with a bright blue sky and fluffy white clouds. The image is oriented vertically (rotated 90 degrees clockwise). The view is framed at the top by a dark, rough-hewn stone archway or bridge underside. The central focus is the Phare du Gabut, a small lighthouse with a white tower, red lantern, and red horizontal bands. Behind the lighthouse stands a large white Ferris wheel (La Grande Roue). To the right of the lighthouse, colorful wooden buildings with yellow and green facades, characteristic of the Gabut district, are visible. In the foreground right, a white boat with yellow accents (likely a local water bus or ferry) floats on the calm, dark water of the harbor.

details.description: A view of the Old Port (Vieux Port) in La Rochelle, France, captured from beneath a stone archway. The scene features the distinctive Phare du Quai Valin, a white lighthouse with red horizontal bands and a red lantern room. Behind it stands a large white Ferris wheel (Grande Roue). The waterfront is lined with trees and buildings, including a yellow-painted structure. The water of the harbor is visible in the foreground, with a small portion of a boat appearing at the bottom right. The sky is bright blue with scattered white cumulus clouds.
